description: iSendPro Telecom is a messaging platform for sending SMS campaigns and transactional SMS, along with related services such as voice messaging and RCS. It provides SaaS tools and developer-facing messaging APIs for integrating outbound messaging into applications.
summary: iSendPro exposes a documented SMS REST API with public machine-readable OpenAPI/Swagger specs and account `keyid` query-parameter authentication; its other listed protocols (HTTPS, SMPP, Mail2SMS) are only documented behind login and could not be mapped as public integration surfaces from public docs.
